capturedProcessTree.command:
/bin/sh -c (i=0; while true; do printf "\033[1;3%dm● B2.2 LIVE %04d\033[0m  " "$(( (i % 6) + 1 ))" "$i"; i=$((i+1)); [ $((i % 4)) -eq 0 ] && printf "
"; sleep 0.25; done) & ticker_pid=$!; trap 'kill "$ticker_pid" 2>/dev/null' EXIT; while IFS= read -r line; do printf "
B2.3 RESPONSE:%s
" "$line"; done

boundedWindow.fromSeqProof: reconnect at afterSeq=0 reached firstCorrectFrame; sliceFrom refuses afterSeq below the retained start
